bounded_scope: Add the canonical workspace admin import panel for /api/admin/users/import and one-time setup password display without direct Figma work.
changes: Added an admin-only Users tab to the canonical workspace for importing one account through /api/admin/users/import.
The panel collects an import reason plus email, display name, role, and scope fields, and normalizes non-teacher imports to global scope before submit.
The workspace maps import validation and permission errors to user-visible production-safe messages.
Successful imports render returned setup passwords only from the immediate no-store response with data-admin-import-result="one-time-setup-passwords".
Added workspace VM/source coverage for the admin import panel, one-time setup output, route marker, and no-store marker.
Added workspace-browser-smoke source marker checks for optional local HTTP smoke runs.

validation.result: pass with expected skips; 3 optional local-server checks skipped because no base URL was provided
pass; 162 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in local-server skips

validation.result: pass; HTTP 200 contained data-admin-action="import-users", /api/admin/users/import, and data-admin-import-result="one-time-setup-passwords" on poll 2 after push
pass; cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated output, site options, static/live Cloudflare verification, and 162 passing tests / 3 expected opt-in skips

blockers.cause: Existing live Drive check reaches token exchange, root folder, and index sheet, but Google Drive create/upload returns redacted HTTP 403.
blockers.next_safe_action: Confirm service-account file-create permission/quota/Workspace policy for the configured root folder, then rerun npm run check:drive:live.

blockers.cause: The admin UI can display setup passwords once for fake .test proof, but Bryan has not approved a real-user manual distribution procedure or invitation/email delivery policy.
blockers.next_safe_action: Decide HD-2026-05-21-001 before importing real pilot users.

Continue broader role-scope and protected-record tests before pilot use.
